positive: A symmetrical, central composition of fantastical celestial flora growing from swirling cosmic dust. The design features stylized, illuminated bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate vines intertwined with abstract constellations, giving a Neo-Art Nouveau cosmic feel. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, jade green, and stark gold leaf accents. The illustration must be suitable for a repeating apparel print, featuring clean, distinct silhouettes and sharp outlines against a solid background. Highly detailed, vector illustration style, volumetric lighting, centered design, high contrast, maximalist complexity, 8k print artwork.
negative: blurry, low detail, noisy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, smudge, gradient fade, poor anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, cartoon, childish, realistic photo, photography
